name: SWS MU CSI SWS Electronic Industry Index Classified Fund
summary: SWS MU CSI SWS Electronic Industry Index Classified Fund is an index fund that tracks the performance of the CSI SWS Electronic Industry Index and is structured as a classified fund. The fund aims to provide investors with exposure to companies in the electronic industry in China. It is managed by SWS MU Fund Management Co., Ltd., a Chinese asset management firm.
